g.title: Function is executed via the slow interpreter dispatch loop.

ul.li: COLD: Every call costs ~10 cycles for dispatch.
COMPILED: Every call costs ~1 cycle for jump.

div.p: Trigger: Call Guard: counter > 1 Action: counter--
Trigger: Call Guard: counter == 1 Action: counter--, trigger_jit()
Trigger: jit_compile() error Action: is_blacklisted = true
Trigger: Function Call Action: Jump to jit_entry

g.title: Function is executed via the slow interpreter dispatch loop.
